prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement configuration loading: the INI file parser, the environment variable override logic, the default values per section, and the sensitive config value masking for the /api/admin/settings endpoint.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement configuration loading: the INI file parser, the environment variable override logic, the default values per section, and the sensitive config value masking for the /api/admin/settings endpoint.
